news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches RKLX and HIMZ: 2X Leveraged ETFs for Rocket Lab and Hims & Hers

holdings.infoBox: HIMZ is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long HIMS ETF (HIMZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Hims & Hers Health Inc. (HIMS), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements HIMZ was launched on Mar 12, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
